overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game (Elden Ring), showing a hooded player character standing in a foggy grassland at night, facing the massive glowing Erdtree in the distance. The atmosphere is dark and moody with flying creatures silhouetted against the cloudy sky, and the character slowly begins to move forward through the tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy grassland with scattered dead trees and massive glowing fantasy tree landmark

events.description: flock of dark birds flies across the cloudy night sky from left to right
character transitions from stationary stance to slow forward walking
white circular interaction prompt appears at bottom center of screen indicating available action

agents.ego_description: hooded character in dark cloak stands observing the distant glowing tree, then begins walking slowly forward through tall grass

entered.detail: massive glowing golden tree towering in the distance, illuminating the foggy atmosphere
leafless gnarled tree with bare branches silhouetted against the sky
dark mountain range visible on the horizon beneath the clouds
tall dark grass covering the ground, swaying slightly in the foreground
ruined stone structures with small glowing lights scattered at the base of the erdtree

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in a wide-open foggy grassland at night, facing the iconic glowing Erdtree in the distance. Dead trees frame the scene while birds fly across the cloudy sky. The character transitions from stillness to slow forward movement, and a UI interaction prompt briefly appears at the bottom of the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a moment of stillness to a slow, purposeful advance across a moody nocturnal landscape. It begins with the player character standing motionless in a wide-open foggy grassland, facing the massive, glowing Erdtree that illuminates the distant horizon. As the character begins to move forward, the camera glides through the tall grass, passing beneath a cloudy sky where birds fly in silhouette. The scene then expands to reveal dead trees framing the periphery while a UI interaction prompt briefly appears at the bottom of the screen, marking the shift from observation to action.
